specific_question: In Q3 2024, what was the most frequent reason patients contacted the MediConn Solutions' customer service department after their virtual visits, and what is the desired decrease in percentage of that inquiry in 2025?
answer: In Q3 2024, according to a poll conducted by MediConn Solutions' customer service department, 42% of post-visit customer service inquiries were about billing confusion, specifically why charges differed from what patients expected based on their corporate wellness plan coverage versus provincial health insurance. The MediConn Solutions' customer service department is looking to reduce the percentage of such inquiries by 50% by 2025.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
